title: A Town in Quebec Is the First Governing Body to Adopt the Universal Declaration of the Rights of Trees
summary_full: Terrasse-Vaudreuil has adopted a resolution to protect trees, which its mayor called “indispensable allies,” as living beings.
summary_public: Terrasse-Vaudreuil has adopted a resolution to protect trees, which its mayor called “indispensable allies,” as living beings.
